name: Bug report
about: Something in Halonyx isn't working the way it should
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a security vulnerability?**
If yes, stop — do not file it here. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and use private reporting instead.

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include exact error messages if any.

## Environment
- Node version: (run `node -v`)
- OS:
- Browser (if frontend-related):
- Local instance or the hosted demo (halonyx.onrender.com)?

## Component
Which part is affected? (check one or more)
- [ ] `protocol/` — Signal Protocol implementation (X3DH, Double Ratchet)
- [ ] `backend/` — server, auth, database
- [ ] `frontend/` — UI
- [ ] `simulator/` — protocol explainer
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Docs

## Logs / screenshots
Paste any relevant console output, server logs, or screenshots. Redact any USID, JWT, or key material before posting.

## Additional context
Anything else worth knowing — did this work before, does it only happen with a specific contact/session, etc.
